The CCW HCC files are linkable data files using the CCW BENE_ID. 

4.1 CCW Risk Score Operational Payment Base File 

The base (resolved) risk score file the CCW team provides to researchers uses a beneficiary’s characteristics to identify 
the beneficiary’s correct monthly payment score, i.e., the monthly “resolved” risk scores for
